department: Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office

external_services.service_name: Releasing of Confiscated Goods/ Items Apprehended from Illegal Vendors
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Releasing of Confiscated Goods_Items Apprehended from Illegal Vendors
external_services.who_may_avail: Market vendors who were apprehended for illegal transactions

checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Ordinance Compliance and Monitoring Division and present the duplicate copy of the Citation Ticket
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the duplicate copy of the Citation Ticket and advise the client to pay the fine/ penalty
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Ordinance Compliance and Monitoring Division and present the duplicate copy of the Citation Ticket
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Coordinate with Lipa CPOS-OCMD to prepare the goods/ items confiscated
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Ordinance Compliance and Monitoring Division and present the duplicate copy of the Citation Ticket
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the citation ticket to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Extension Office and pay the corresponding fines or penalties
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees_to_be_paid: 1st offense – P500.00; 2nd offense – P1,000.00; 3rd offense – P5,000.00 plus imprisonment of 10 days to 6 months
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to Lipa CPOS-OCMD and claim the confiscated goods/ items
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Release the confiscated goods/ items upon presentation of the Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to any Lipa CPOS Office concerned (Admin, Traffic Management Division, Ordinance Compliance and Monitoring Division or Tricycle Franchising Division) and file formal complaints
steps.agency_action: 1.1. For minor issues: Record, monitor, evaluate the issues lodged by the complainant and the defendant and settle with fair decision for minor issues
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Traffic Operation Officer IV / Special Operations Officer IV / Security Officer II / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to any Lipa CPOS Office concerned (Admin, Traffic Management Division, Ordinance Compliance and Monitoring Division or Tricycle Franchising Division) and file formal complaints
steps.agency_action: 1.2. For major issues: The division head concern initiates the investigation, refer to CPOS Officer for decision and/ or refer the same to the appropriate agency (PNP, LTO, Legal Office and other appropriate agencies)
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Traffic Operation Officer IV / Special Operations Officer IV / Security Officer II / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

external_services.total_processing_time: 1 hour for major issues / 20 minutes for minor issues

steps.client_step: 1. Present the duplicate copy of the traffic citation ticket
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Retrieve the original TCT with the confiscated driver’s license and advise the client to pay the violation fee
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / III / IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Present the duplicate copy of the traffic citation ticket
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / III / IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office, Lipa City Treasurer’s Extension Office or Traffic Management Division and pay the corresponding fee
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office and claim the confiscated driver’s license
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Release the confiscated driver’s license upon presentation of the Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / III / IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

service_notice.service_name: Driving under the influence of liquor
Driving with delinquent/ invalid driver’s license
Student driver not accompanied by duly licensed driver
No body (plate) number for hire vehicle
Driving with sleeveless shirt and without shoes
Original copy or xerox copy of Certificate of Registration/ Official Receipt and CPC not carried
Illegal use of license, plate number or Certificate of Registration
Failure to give Right of Way to emergency vehicles
Driving motor vehicle emitting excessive smoke/ odor noise
Allowing another person to use his license
No helmet for single motorcycle driver and rider
Unauthorized bell, siren or exhaust whistle
Reduction scheme PUJs/ van/ multicab/ tricycle

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Valid driver’s license of claimant – 1 photocopy
Authorization letter and ID of representative (If authorized representative)

steps.client_step: 1. Present the duplicate copy of the traffic citation ticket to Lipa CPOS Administrative Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive duplicate copy of Citation Ticket
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / III / IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Present the duplicate copy of the traffic citation ticket to Lipa CPOS Administrative Division
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment upon presentation of requirements
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / III / IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to Lipa City Treasurer’s Office, Lipa CTO Satellite Office at Public Market to pay the corresponding violation fee
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to Lipa CPOS-TMD Office to claim the impounded vehicle
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Release the impounded vehicle upon presentation of the Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / III / IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

service_notice.processing_fee: P500.00 for 72 hours and additional P200.00 on succeeding day
P1,000.00 for 72 hours and additional P200.00 on succeeding day
P1,500.00 for 72 hours and additional P200.00 on succeeding day

external_services.service_name: Renewal of Tricycle Franchise/ Motorized Tricycle Operator’s Permit
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Renewal of Tricycle Franchise Motorized Tricycle Operator’s Permit

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Motorized Tricycle Operator’s Franchise – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: City Public Order and Safety Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements to the Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and check the required document
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II / Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to Lipa City Engineering Office for inspection of the unit
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Check the roadworthiness and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Motorpool Division (Lipa City Engineering Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Proceed to Lipa City Treasurer’s Office for payment of corresponding fees
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Accept payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Accept application form and other documents for final checking
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 4.2. Prepare Motorized Tricycle Operator’s Franchise (MTOF)
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer IV / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 4.3. Final review of MTOF
steps.person_responsible: City Public Order and Safety Officer (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 4.4. Final checking and approval of the MTOF by the Chairman of the LCTFRB
steps.person_responsible: City Mayor (Lipa City Mayor’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Application for Renewal of Tricycle Franchise

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Proof of Residency, OR/CR, Insurance, Barangay Clearance
Driver’s License, CTC, MTOF, 2x2 ID Picture, Inspection Report

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and check the required document
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to Lipa City Engineering Office for the inspection of the unit
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Check the road worthiness of the vehicle and issue Certificate of Road Worthiness
steps.person_responsible: Motorpool Division (Lipa City Engineering Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Proceed to Lipa City Treasurer’s Office for payment of corresponding fees
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Office
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Accept the application form and other documents for final checking
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Office
steps.agency_action: 4.2. Prepare Motorized Tricycle Operator’s Franchise (MTOF)
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer IV (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Office
steps.agency_action: 4.3. Review MTOF
steps.person_responsible: City Public Order and Safety Office (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Office
steps.agency_action: 4.4. Approve MTOF by the Chairman of LCTFRB
steps.person_responsible: City Mayor (Lipa City Mayor’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Renewal of Mayor’s Permit for Tricycle

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: LTO OR/CR, MTOF, Cedula, ID of operator

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the required documents for initial checking
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to the Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division, submit the documents and photocopy of Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Record and have the client sign the receiving logbook and release the sticker
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

external_services.service_name: Transfer of Ownership of Motorized Tricycle and Change Motor
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Transfer of Ownership of Motorized Tricycle and Change Motor
external_services.who_may_avail: Tricycle operators with or without franchise

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Form 04 / Form 05, OR/CR, Insurance, Brgy Clearance, Deed of Sale

steps.client_step: 1. Submit notarized application form together with the complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the application form and check the completeness of the submitted documents and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer III / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to the Lipa City Engineering Office for inspection of the unit
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Inspect the motorcycle unit for road-worthiness and issue Certification of Road Worthiness
steps.person_responsible: Motorpool Division (Lipa City Engineering Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees_to_be_paid: P160.00 for Change Motor / P2,500.00 for transfer of ownership
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division and submit final requirements
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Prepare MTOF
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer IV / Public Utilities Regulation Officer II (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division and submit final requirements
steps.agency_action: 4.2. Final review of MTOF and documents
steps.person_responsible: City Public Order and Safety Officer (Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to Lipa CPOS - Tricycle Franchising Division and submit final requirements
steps.agency_action: 4.3. Approve MTOF by the Chairman of LCTFRB
steps.person_responsible: City Mayor (Lipa City Mayor’s Office)
